page_content:
Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 191

ENGL388 Writing, Research, and Media Internships (1-6 Credits) Explore career-facing opportunities on campus, in the D.C. metro area, and beyond. English internships can be individualized, working with businesses, not-for-profit organizations, state and federal governments, high schools, and incarcerated students. We also offer structured internship pathways with the Maryland General Assembly Program, the Emily Dickinson Electronic Archives, the Writing Center, our Undergraduate Teaching Assistant Program, and BookLab, our makerspace and letterpress printing studio.
